name: adam-portfolio-site
description: Editorial publication-style portfolio with the new ATJ identity system, a complete logo-development case study, accessible project overlays, and optimized production assets.

scripts.notes: No build step required. Open index.html directly or serve locally.

notes: Static portfolio repository. Netlify deploys from the repository root with no build command. See ISSUE_HISTORY.md and CHANGELOG.md for release history.
